body.title: Update all agent_datacenter string references to UnseenUniversity
body.result: All string refs updated: Python package→unseen_university, runtime dir→~/.unseen_university, env var→UNSEEN_UNIVERSITY_HOME, docs/configs/scripts both repos, dir renamed to UnseenUniversity, palace DB nodes updated
body.description:
Replace all live string references to 'agent_datacenter' with 'UnseenUniversity' in CLAUDE.md, README, scripts, device configs, log path definitions, and any other source files. Check TheIgors scripts for hardcoded /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter paths. Exclude git history and pure archival documentation.

**Affected files:** CLAUDE.md, README.md, scripts/*.py/sh referencing agent_datacenter by string, device config files, any TheIgors scripts with hardcoded ADC path
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** String replacement in source files only; does not rename local directory or GitHub repo (that is T-gh-rename-adc-to-uu)
**Test plan:** `grep -r 'agent_datacenter' . --include='*.py' --include='*.md' --include='*.json' --include='*.sh'` returns only historical/archive references, not live code paths
